title: Indian-Style Scrambled Eggs
description: A flavorful twist on traditional scrambled eggs, infused with the aromas of tadka spices. Quick and easy to make, perfect for a breakfast or brunch option.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Add a pinch of salt and pepper to taste.
Heat the butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the tadka spice mix to the pan and let it infuse into the butter for 1 minute.
Pour the whisked eggs into the pan and let them cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently scramble the eggs, breaking them up into small curds.
Continue cooking the eggs for another 2-3 minutes, or until they are cooked through.
Serve the Indian-Style Scrambled Eggs hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or chives if desired.
